calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Trial
Off Calendar Feb-09-2022 Off Calendar

Co-Petitioners Oleg Bolshakoff And Svetlana N. Sommerville'S Petition For Instructions: 1) To Determine The Construction Of The Trust Instrument
Off Calendar Feb-09-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Mediation
Off Calendar Feb-09-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Case Management Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-17-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Konstantine Demiris, via ZOOM, for Oleg Bolshakoff and Svetlana Sommerville, Petitioners; Milla Lvovich, via ZOOM, for Elena Bolshakoff, Respondent.

Mr. Demiris reports that the parties have moved through some discovery and have depositions calendared and that he would be interested in mediation. The court advises the parties that it will be ordering them to pro bono mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than Jan-21-2022. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by Jan-28-2022 The parties are to return on Feb-09-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation. Mr. Demiris notes that the Feb-09-2022 trial date may be premature at the moment. The court reminds counsel that this matter was set for trial by the court quite some time ago and advises them to meet and confer regarding a new trial date and then formally file papers if needed. Mr. Demiris points the court to the brief he filed regarding grounds for an interim order preventing the respondent from using trust funds to pay attorney's fees in defense of trust contest. The court advises counsel that the matter will be taken under submission and confirms with the parties that they have nothing to add regarding Mr. Demiris' brief and are submitting on their respective papers.

The Petition for Instructions, etc., is continued to Feb-09-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. The Case Management Hearing is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Co-Petitioners Oleg Bolshakoff And Svetlana N. Sommerville'S Petition For Instructions: 1) To Determine The Construction Of The Trust Instrument
Off Calendar Nov-17-2021 Continued To Feb-09-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Co-Petitioners Oleg Bolshakoff And Svetlana N. Sommerville'S Petition For Instructions: 1) To Determine The Construction Of The Trust Instrument
Off Calendar Sep-08-2021 Continued To Nov-17-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Konstantine Demiris, via ZOOM, for Oleg Bolshakoff and Svetlana Sommerville, Petitioners; Milla Lvovich, via ZOOM, for Elena Bolshakoff, Objector.

Mr. Demiris begins by reporting that he has received discovery responses and will be arranging depositions and possibly, mediation. Ms. Lvovich reports that she intends to send discovery requests by this week. Mr. Demiris advises that he feels that the parties would benefit from mediation but not until discovery is complete. The court advises counsel that it expects to have more substantive summaries in their next reports filed with the court. The court then instructs Mr. Demiris to file a report three (3) weeks prior to the next calling of this matter and Ms. Lvovich to file her report two (2) weeks prior.

The Co-Petitioner's Petition for Instruction, etc., is continued to 11/17/2021. The Case Management Hearing is off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Case Management Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-08-2021 Off Calendar

Co-Petitioners Oleg Bolshakoff And Svetlana N. Sommerville'S Petition For Instructions: 1) To Determine The Construction Of The Trust Instrument
Off Calendar Jun-16-2021 Continued To Sep-08-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Konstantine Demiris, via ZOOM, counsel for Oleg Bolshakoff and Svetlana Sommerville, Petitioners; Milla Lvovich, via ZOOM, counsel for Elena Bolshakoff, Respondent.

The court begins by querying counsel if they have met and conferred and what plans they may have to possibly resolve this matter. Mr. Demiris reports that discovery has been propounded, and mediation has been discussed but that it appears as though Ms. Lvovich is not interested in mediating. Ms. Lvovich confirms that she never stated to Mr. Demiris that she was not interested in mediating and would be agreeable to mediation. Court and counsel continue to discuss the matter and the court advises counsel that it intends to issue a Case Management Order (CMC) with CMC dates and a trial date. Mr. Demiris reports that this matter should be ready for trial in early 2022 and Ms. Lvovich agrees.

The Petition for Instructions, etc., is continued to September 8, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204. The court instructs Mr. Demiris to monitor the court's register of actions for the CMC and trial order and serve the parties in this matter accordingly.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Co-Petitioners Oleg Bolshakoff And Svetlana N. Sommerville'S Petition For Instructions: 1) To Determine The Construction Of The Trust Instrument
